headline: Claude Mythos Raises New AI Concerns For Palo Alto Networks Valuation
summary: Palo Alto Networks (NasdaqGS:PANW) shares and other cybersecurity stocks sold off after leaked details on Anthropic's upcoming Claude Mythos AI model. The news has raised investor worries that AI native security tools could automate or commoditize core cybersecurity functions. Sector commentary points to a material shift in sentiment around long term competitive risks for traditional vendors. Palo Alto Networks, a large player in enterprise cybersecurity, sells firewalls, cloud security and...
